Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes Can See Video on a LaserDisc 88 upvotes, 4 comments
  2. Blacksky AppView 30 upvotes, 0 comments
  3. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 28 upvotes, 1 comments
  4. Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms 37 upvotes, 3 comments
  5. FrameBook 317 upvotes, 60 comments
  6. LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown 233 upvotes, 42 comments
  7. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 53 upvotes, 7 comments
  8. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 138 upvotes, 35 comments
  9. What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential? 70 upvotes, 16 comments
  10. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 59 upvotes, 16 comments
  11. Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm 188 upvotes, 80 comments
  12. LLM Writing Tropes.md 307 upvotes, 140 comments
  13. I made a programming language with M&Ms 25 upvotes, 6 comments
  14. Lil Finder Guy 29 upvotes, 9 comments
  15. Log messages are mostly for the people operating your software 82 upvotes, 37 comments
  16. Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds 99 upvotes, 49 comments
  17. Beagle, a source code management system that stores AST trees 74 upvotes, 37 comments
  18. SQG (SQL to Code Generator) Now with Java Streams and List Type Support 8 upvotes, 1 comments
  19. The changing goalposts of AGI and timelines 309 upvotes, 200 comments
  20. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 58 upvotes, 31 comments
  21. Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting 308 upvotes, 231 comments
  22. WSL Manager 53 upvotes, 31 comments
  23. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 145 upvotes, 113 comments
  24. Ask HN: How to be alone? 170 upvotes, 149 comments
  25. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 115 upvotes, 103 comments
  26. Show HN: Skir – like Protocol Buffer but better 48 upvotes, 38 comments
  27. My “grand vision” for Rust 86 upvotes, 79 comments
  28. Detection Is Not Protection: What WAF Detection Mode Does (and Doesn't) 3 upvotes, 0 comments
  29. My Homelab Setup 89 upvotes, 89 comments
  30. A basket of new fruit varieties is coming your way 33 upvotes, 32 comments

Last generated 6:30am, 9 March 2026. Source here.
